title: gh-126313: Fix a crash in `curse.napms` due to incorrect error handling
author: picnixz

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: The backports will need to be manual because they will be in conflict with the new structure of the `curses` module (I haven't changed much the macros so the backport will be easy).

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: (I think I forgot to include the latest CI tasks in this branch, which is why it was stuck)

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @picnixz for the PR, and @serhiy-storchaka for merging it 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.12, 3.13.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @picnixz and @serhiy-storchaka, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.13` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker 19d935843727fff93b2c0e09a63fd32c0d97098d 3.13
```

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @picnixz and @serhiy-storchaka, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.12` due to a conflict.

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: I won't have time for the backports, so I'll do it upon my return (Wednesday). Anyone else is free to try.

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-126493](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/126493) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.13 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.13).

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: Update: No need for a 3.12 backport (see the issue for details)
